function.message: I can’t complete this inbox request as written because it asks for OCR on five files, but only four readable target files are present. I made no file edits and did not delete the inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Per process-next-inbox-item and inbox-processing-v2-update, if completion is blocked, stop without partial workspace mutations. Per clarification discipline, do not silently complete a partial task when required referenced data is missing.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request explicitly lists five OCR targets in 00_inbox/724_next-task.md, but only four corresponding readable finance records were found/read. Because the full requested set cannot be processed from available evidence, the correct outcome is clarification rather than partial completion.
